fixes.origin:
query_text = (
    "SELECT id, subject, status, created_at "
    "FROM tickets "
    "WHERE subject LIKE '%" + keyword + "%' "
)

if status:
    query_text += "AND status = '" + status + "' "

cur.execute(query_text)
fixes.replacement:
query_text = (
    "SELECT id, subject, status, created_at "
    "FROM tickets "
    "WHERE subject LIKE ? "
)

params = [f"%{keyword}%"]

if status:
    query_text += "AND status = ? "
    params.append(status)

query_text += "ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 50"

cur.execute(query_text, tuple(params))
